# Research Peptides UK
> Research-grade peptide catalog and education hub for laboratory research workflows in the UK and globally.

Research Peptides UK supplies research-use-only peptide compounds, documentation references, and educational resources for qualified laboratory contexts. Products are not for human or veterinary use.

## Key Pages
- /: Homepage and research peptide positioning
- /shop: Research peptide catalog
- /categories: Peptide category hub
- /coas: Certificate of Analysis library
- /peptide-guide: Research peptide handling guide
- /peptide-information: Synthesis, solubility, purification and analytical education
- /peptide-research: GLP, KPV, IGF and pathway research briefs
- /faq: Purity, storage, shipping and payment FAQ
- /about-us: Trust and research-only positioning
- /terms: Research-only terms
